scripts.prebuild: pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/core build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/tools build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/prompts build
scripts.start:dev: pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/core build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/tools build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/prompts build && tsx watch src/main.ts
scripts.pretest:e2e: pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/core build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/tools build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/prompts build
scripts.pretypecheck: pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/core build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/tools build && pnpm --filter @nest-langchain/prompts build
